name: Tülu 2+DPO 70B
license: AI2 ImpACT Low-risk License (built on Llama 2 Community License)
archDisplay: Dense Transformer (Llama 2 70B architecture, GQA, RoPE, RMSNorm)
note: Zephyr-style DPO recipe applied to Llama-2-70B SFT; largest publicly released DPO-trained model at the time
tpsNote: 70B model needs ~41GB even at Q4_K_M — exceeds a single RTX 4090's 24GB VRAM
verificationNotes: Confirmed real via arXiv paper (2311.10702, submitted 2023-11-17) and HF model card. AI2 ImpACT Low-risk license confirmed via search. Context length 8192 (ctxK=8) confirmed directly from the model's raw config.json (max_position_embeddings=8192). AlpacaEval 95.1% win rate and MT-Bench 7.89 both confirmed via independent secondary sources quoting the HF card.
